data.title: Hello, world from Elixir
data.excerpt: A blog post stored as a JSON file in @webhouse/cms and rendered by an Elixir/Plug/Bandit app.
data.content:
## The setup

This post lives at `content/posts/hello-world.json`. **Elixir reads it directly** via the `WebhouseBlog.Webhouse` module — no API calls, no database, just `File.read/1` and `Jason.decode/1`.

## Phoenix compatible

The `Webhouse` module has zero Plug-specific code. Drop it into a Phoenix project under `lib/my_app/webhouse.ex` and call it from any controller — the API is identical.

## BEAM concurrency

Bandit handles thousands of concurrent connections on the BEAM VM. The reader is stateless, so there's no contention.
data.author: Christian Broberg
